characters.name: Alex Mazurkian
characters.description: Alex MazurkianBiographyStatusAliveRelativesElla Mazurkian (daughter)Luke Mazurkian (son)RomancesTim Mazurkian (husband)OccupationSupervising NurseResidenceOregonAppearancesSeasonsS1•S2•S3Episodes36First appeared"Welcome to St. Denis"PortrayerAllison TolmanAlex Mazurkianis a character fromSt. Denis Medical. She is portrayed byAllison Tolman. Luke Mazurkian (son) Alex is the supervising nurse at St. Denis Medical. She is married to Tim Mazurkian and they have two children. As a child Alex wanted to be a doctor but after spending time in the hospital with a family member she realized that nurses to all the work.

characters.name: Ashley
characters.description: AshleyBiographyStatusAliveRomancesSandersonAppearancesSeasonsS2Episodes2First appeared"This Is From Joyce"PortrayerKristen SchaalAshleyis a recurring character fromSt. Denis Medical. She is played by Kristen Schaal.

characters.name: Brandon
characters.description: BrandonBiographyStatusaliveOccupationRegistered NurseAppearancesSeasons2Brandon is a minor recurring character in St Dennis Medical. He is a RN that first appeared in the season 2 premiere. Brandon is a sarcastic nurse, often making sly remarks to the main characters, viewing them as weird. It is implied that Brandon is queer.

characters.name: Bruce Schweitz

He is portrayed byJosh Lawson. B-dog (himself)Blob (Danny Fitzgerald)Blobber (Danny Fitzgerald)Fat boy (Danny Fitzgerald)Fatty McFat (Danny Fitzgerald)Cream Puff (Danny Fitzgerald)Pop Tart (Danny Fitzgerald)Dump Truck (Danny Fitzgerald)Jiggles (Danny Fitzgerald)Jabba the Butt (Danny Fitzgerald) Bruce often annoys other people, either as a result of his overconfidence or his general missing of social cues. He likes to dance to warm up before surgery. He is very cautious about his health and has a dedicated routine in order to maintain his health.

characters.name: Dakota
characters.description: DakotaBiographyOccupationRegistered NurseAppearancesSeasons1-2Dakotais a minor recurring character onSt. Denis Medical. She is hated by the main characters, specifically byBruce SchweitzandJoyce Henderson. Joyce refers to her as a "nightmare of a human". Dakota is often seen with Holly, as she also cuts Dakota's hair.Cartegory:Recurring

characters.name: Joyce Henderson
characters.description: Joyce HendersonBiographyAliasesJo-Jo (Sanderson)StatusAliveRomancesSanderson (ex-fiance)Cody (hook-up)OccupationExecutive DirectorOncologist (former)ResidenceOregonAppearancesSeasonsS1•S2•S3Episodes36First appeared"Welcome to St. Denis"PortrayerWendi McLendon-CoveyJoyce Hendersonis the main protagonist onSt. Denis Medical. She is portrayed byWendi McLendon-Covey. Joyce is the ambitious, kooky executive director of St. Denis Regional Medical Center. the Henderson Family has a lake house Joyce invites Alex to. Much of her family is lactose intolerant.

characters.name: Keith
characters.description: KeithBiographyStatusmarriedRelativesLinda (wife)Sampson (son) 2 other unnamed childrenOccupationregistered nurse Sampson (son) 2 other unnamed children Keith is a Rn at St Dennis Medical and a minor, recurring character throughout seasons 1 and 2.

characters.name: Matt Pearson
characters.description: Matt PearsonBiographyAliasesMatty (coworkers)Matty the kid (Bruce and himself)Scat Matt (back in Montana)Hayseed (Joyce)Little boy doctor (family member of dying patient)StatusAliveRelativesWyatt Pearson (cousin)Budgie Pearson (uncle)RomancesSerena Jung(girlfriend)Violet Elizabeth Chastity Stokely-Pearson (ex-wife)OccupationER NurseResidenceOregonAppearancesSeasonsS1•S2•S3Episodes36First appearedWelcome to St. DenisPortrayerMekki LeeperMatthew Ebenezer Charles Jedediah Pearsonis a main character onSt. Denis Medical. He is portrayed byMekki Leeper. Matthew Pearson was born into a "rather religious community that doesn't believe in modern medicine." He grew up in Montana, on a homestead that could provide the family with food "when the secular world destroyed itself." In an earlier version of the pilot script, Matt introduces himself by specifying that he is from the larger metro area around Billings. Matt was one of two people in his high school graduating class (the other being his ex wife Violet). Matt was homeschooled for 13 years until "the state got involved." Matt's religious beliefs are not clearly stated but under christian influence. He has said that the Bible was the only book he was allowed to read growing up, but while he gets all details of certain Bible stories correct, such as that of Naaman the Leper, he gets other details oddly wrong, like when he mentions how he "played the back half of the T-rex that Mary Magdalene rode" in a production with his youth group. Humans and dinosaurs living together is a creationist belief. He has also said that his grandfather wrote a "sequel" to the Bible. The fact that they didn't celebrate birthdays speaks for a connection to Jehovah's Witnesses, the fact that the family doesn't believe in medicine speaks for christian science. The sect he grew up in was therefore likely a creation of his grandfather. Through out the first season his sense of standing up for what he beliefs in has evolved to him having more backbone. Honesty and appreciation are very highly valued qualities for him. Matt became an organ donor in episode 2 of Season 1. Matt is naive and doesn't know a lot of conventions due to his sheltered homestead upbringing. He is very kind and open to learning.
